summary: Comprehensive testing of BISD HUB iteration 7 new features completed. All features working correctly: 1) Voice recorder button (microphone icon) visible in Global Chat and DM input areas, 2) Audio/Video call buttons visible in DM header when conversation is selected, 3) DM search bar visible at top of DM sidebar and filters conversations, 4) Backend accepts audio/webm uploads for voice messages, 5) WebSocket handles WebRTC signaling messages. Backend 100% pass rate (28/28 tests). Frontend UI 100% functional.
passed_tests: Login with USER001/user123 - redirects to main app
Login with ADMIN001/admin123 - admin access granted
Login with MOD001/mod123 - moderator access granted
Global Chat: Voice recorder button (microphone icon) visible next to chat input
Global Chat: Chat message input and send button visible
Global Chat: General chat room visible with Connected status
Global Chat: Chat rooms list visible (General, Boys Only, Class Grade 10, etc.)
DM section: Search conversations input visible at top of DM sidebar
DM section: Search filters conversations by name/ID
DM section: When conversation selected, Phone and Video call buttons visible in header
DM section: Voice recorder button visible in DM input area
DM section: DM message input and send button visible
Backend: /api/upload accepts audio/webm files
Backend: /api/upload accepts audio/ogg files
Backend: /api/upload accepts audio/mp4 files
Backend: /api/upload accepts audio/mpeg files
Backend: /api/upload accepts audio/wav files
Backend: /api/upload still accepts image files
Backend: /api/upload rejects unauthorized requests
Backend: /api/dm/search endpoint works
Backend: /api/dm/search with empty query returns empty list
Backend: Chat messages have expected fields including voice_url support
SearchResultsPage (/search?q=test) works with All/Users/Posts tabs
Settings page has 'Manage Friends & Requests' button in FRIENDS section
Admin Panel: Pending, Users, Action Logs, Help Chat tabs visible
Admin Panel: Users tab shows table with ID, Name, Email, Class, Role, Edit columns
Admin Panel: Edit buttons (pencil icons) visible for each user
Admin Panel: Action Logs tab has search input
Admin Panel: Action Logs shows serial numbers, admin names, targets, details
Moderation Panel: Post Reports and Chat Reports tabs visible with counts
Moderation Panel: Post Reports shows VIOLATOR info (name, ID, class/section)
Moderation Panel: Post Reports shows REPORTED POST CONTENT
Moderation Panel: Chat Reports tab clickable
Home feed: All feed tabs visible (Official, Public, Following, Friends)
Home feed: Search input visible in right sidebar
critical_code_review_comments: VoiceRecorder component uses MediaRecorder API with audio/webm format - browser compatibility is good for modern browsers
CallUI component uses WebRTC with STUN servers (stun.l.google.com:19302) - standard configuration
WebSocket signaling for calls handles: call_offer, call_answer, ice_candidate, call_end, call_reject
Voice messages stored with voice_url field in both chat_messages and direct_messages collections
DM search filters client-side on display_name and id_number - efficient for small conversation lists
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 7 features verified working: 1) VoiceRecorder component with microphone button in chat/DM inputs - uses MediaRecorder API to record audio/webm, uploads to /api/upload, sends voice_url in WS message, 2) VoicePlayer component for inline audio playback in messages, 3) CallUI component for WebRTC peer-to-peer audio/video calls with full-screen overlay - Phone and Video buttons appear in DM header when conversation is selected, 4) DM search bar at top of sidebar filters conversations by name/ID. Backend endpoints: POST /api/upload accepts audio/* MIME types, WebSocket handles call_offer/call_answer/ice_candidate/call_end/call_reject messages, voice_url field supported in chat_message and dm types. Note: To test call buttons, need to select a DM conversation first.
